paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc is 6.12, with a 1.16 percent change from the prior close and a -31.77 percent change over a window of 20 sessions. The price is as of July 20, 2026.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's financials, with a loss of $486M and zero revenue, as well as the departure of a director due to governance concerns. The company has also completed a $375M convertible notes offering. Retail traders have been bullish on the stock despite the sharp selloff.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and an 8-K filing on July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
